parameters.query: SELECT u.name, u.daily_calories, u.daily_protein_g, u.daily_carbs_g, u.daily_fat_g, u.meals_per_day, u.goal, u.weight_kg, u.target_weight_kg, u.supplement_protein_g, u.meal_protein_budget_g, u.protein_distribution, s.conversation_history, s.current_stage, s.context, (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('product_name', p.product_name, 'category', p.category, 'cut_type', p.cut_type, 'pack_size_grams', p.pack_size_grams, 'pack_size_label', p.pack_size_label, 'price', p.price, 'protein_per_100g', p.protein_per_100g, 'fat_per_100g', p.fat_per_100g, 'calories_per_100g', p.calories_per_100g, 'protein_per_pack', p.protein_per_pack, 'image_url', p.image_url, 'product_page_url', p.product_page_url, 'meal_relevance', p.meal_relevance) ORDER BY p.protein_per_100g DESC NULLS LAST) FROM products p WHERE p.in_stock = true) as products, (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('product_name', st.product_name, 'remaining_grams', st.remaining_grams, 'allocations', st.allocations)) FROM stock_tracker st WHERE st.session_id = $1) as stock FROM users u JOIN sessions s ON u.session_id = s.session_id WHERE u.session_id = $1
UPDATE sessions SET conversation_history = $1::jsonb, context = $2::jsonb WHERE session_id = $3

options.queryReplacement: ={{ JSON.stringify(($('Get User & Products').item.json.conversation_history || []).concat([{"role": "user", "content": $('Webhook').item.json.body.message}, {"role": "assistant", "content": JSON.stringify($('State Engine').item.json.response)}])) }},{{ JSON.stringify($('State Engine').item.json.state) }},{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.session_id }}

parameters.query: UPDATE sessions SET context = $1::jsonb, current_stage = 'checkout' WHERE session_id = $2
